Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.editpage

Interface IElementComposite

All Known Implementing Classes:
ElementComposite
public interface IElementComposite

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    childrenChanged(IRodinElement element, IElementType<?> type)
    Refresh the edit composite recursively when there are some changes for children of input type of the input element.
    void
    dispose()
    Dispose this element composite.
    void
    edit(IInternalElement element, IAttributeType attributeType, int charStart, int charEnd)
    Edit the element for a certain attribute given the attributeType, the start and end positions.
    void
    elementAdded(IRodinElement element)
    Refresh the edit composite recursively when the input element is added.
    void
    elementRemoved(IRodinElement element)
    Refresh the edit composite recursively when the input element is removed.
    void
    folding()
    Collapse the edit composite, i.e.
    org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite
    getComposite()
    Get the main composite widget.
    ElementDescRegistry
    getElemDescRegistry()
    Returns the instance of IElementDescRegistry used.
    IRodinElement
    getElement()
    Return the element associated with this element composite.
    EditPage
    getPage()
    Return the corresponding Edit Page.
    boolean
    isExpanded()
    Check to see if the element composite is expanded or collapsed.
    void
    recursiveExpand(IRodinElement element)
    Recursively expand the editing composite for the input element
    void
    refresh(IRodinElement element)
    Refresh the information display in the composite.
    void
    refresh(IRodinElement element, Set<IAttributeType> set)
    Refresh the information display in the composite if there are some changes for attribute of input type within the input element.
    boolean
    select(IRodinElement element, boolean selected)
    Select / Deselect an Rodin element.
    void
    setExpand(boolean isExpanded, boolean recursive)
    Set the expand status of the element composite.

  • Method Details

    • getPage

      EditPage getPage()
      Return the corresponding Edit Page.
      Returns:
      an Edit Page

    • folding

      void folding()
      Collapse the edit composite, i.e. hide the children of this composite.

    • dispose

      void dispose()
      Dispose this element composite. This is done recursively, i.e. the children is disposed first, then this parent itself.

    • getElement

      IRodinElement getElement()
      Return the element associated with this element composite.
      Returns:
      the associated Rodin element.

    • isExpanded

      boolean isExpanded()
      Check to see if the element composite is expanded or collapsed.
      Returns:
      true if the composite is expanded. Return false if it is collapsed.

    • getComposite

      org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite getComposite()
      Get the main composite widget.
      Returns:
      the composite widget of this element composite.

    • select

      boolean select(IRodinElement element, boolean selected)
      Select / Deselect an Rodin element.
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element
      selected - true if the element is selected. false if the element is de-selected.
      Returns:
      true if the operation is successful, i.e. if the element is indeed selected or de-selected accordingly to the input selectedvalue. Return false otherwise.

    • recursiveExpand

      void recursiveExpand(IRodinElement element)
      Recursively expand the editing composite for the input element
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.

    • refresh

      void refresh(IRodinElement element)
      Refresh the information display in the composite.
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element

    • elementRemoved

      void elementRemoved(IRodinElement element)
      Refresh the edit composite recursively when the input element is removed.
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.

    • elementAdded

      void elementAdded(IRodinElement element)
      Refresh the edit composite recursively when the input element is added.
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.

    • childrenChanged

      void childrenChanged(IRodinElement element, IElementType<?> type)
      Refresh the edit composite recursively when there are some changes for children of input type of the input element.
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.
      type - a Rodin element type.

    • edit

      void edit(IInternalElement element, IAttributeType attributeType, int charStart, int charEnd)
      Edit the element for a certain attribute given the attributeType, the start and end positions.
      Parameters:
      element - an internal element.
      attributeType - an attribute type IAttributeType.
      charStart - start position.
      charEnd - end position.

    • refresh

      void refresh(IRodinElement element, Set<IAttributeType> set)
      Refresh the information display in the composite if there are some changes for attribute of input type within the input element.
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.
      set - a set of attribute types, must not be null. When this is an empty set, the operation is the same as refresh(IRodinElement)

    • setExpand

      void setExpand(boolean isExpanded, boolean recursive)
      Set the expand status of the element composite.
      Parameters:
      isExpanded - true if the element composite is going to expand, false otherwise.
      recursive - true to propagate expand state recursively

    • getElemDescRegistry

      ElementDescRegistry getElemDescRegistry()
      Returns the instance of IElementDescRegistry used.
      Returns:
      an instance of IElementDescRegistry
